overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit night market alley. The scene features Tom's Diner and various Asian-inspired food stalls with red paper lanterns, ceramic jars, and vibrant neon signage in a rainy urban setting.

person in white tank top leaning against the wall near stairs

food service counter with illuminated menu boards above displaying food items

stairs leading up to the main diner entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at Tom's Diner food counter at night, illuminated by red neon signage. Several NPCs stand around the counter area while the camera, following a third-person character, walks past the service area. The environment features wet asphalt ground and industrial architecture with glowing digital menu boards.

two people conversing near the arched doorway

green neon strip lighting running along the base of the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the exterior walkway of Tom's Diner, passing white plastic outdoor seating and an arched entrance. The large red neon sign remains visible in the background while green neon strip lights illuminate the building base. The ground appears wet, reflecting the neon lights.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower alley featuring food stalls with distinctive lighting. A yellow-roofed stall appears first, followed by a green-lit stall displaying large ceramic jars. The environment maintains the wet, reflective ground surface and industrial metal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with red paper lanterns and open food stalls

events.description: slowing slightly while passing the couple dining at the food stall counter
moving past the food stall into the deeper alley section with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the red lantern alley passing diners at a food stall

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a narrow alley decorated with hanging red paper lanterns. The camera passes a food stall where a couple dines at the counter while a vendor works behind the grill. Steam rises from the cooking area, and the alley continues deeper into the market area with various neon signs visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban night market, transitioning from the open service area of a diner into a narrow, atmospheric alleyway. It begins at the food counter of Tom's Diner, moving past NPCs and glowing digital menu boards across wet asphalt. As the camera follows the character along the exterior walkway, the scene shifts past white plastic seating and an arched entrance illuminated by a mix of red and green neon lights. The path then narrows into a dense market corridor, passing a yellow-roofed stall and another lit in green that displays large ceramic jars. Finally, the camera glides deeper into the alley under hanging red paper lanterns, passing a steaming grill where a vendor serves a dining couple amidst a backdrop of distant neon signage.
